title: What Is a Multimeter? A Complete Guide to How It Works
description: Learn what a multimeter is, how it works, and what it measures — voltage, current, and resistance — in this beginner-to-advanced guide for engineers and electricians.
heroAlt: A digital multimeter measuring voltage on a circuit board
excerpt: A multimeter is the most essential instrument in any electrician's or engineer's toolkit. This guide breaks down exactly how it works — from basic physics to practical usage.

title: How to Use a Clamp Meter: Step-by-Step Guide for Electricians
description: A step-by-step guide on how to use a clamp meter safely to measure AC and DC current without breaking a circuit — ideal for electricians and electrical engineers.
heroAlt: Clamp meter clamped around a live conductor measuring current
excerpt: Clamp meters let you measure current safely without cutting a wire. Here's everything you need to know — from jaw placement to reading AC vs DC current.

title: Ohm's Law Explained: The Physics Behind Every Electrical Tester
description: Understand Ohm's Law — V = IR — and how it underpins every measurement made by multimeters, clamp meters, and insulation testers used by engineers worldwide.
heroAlt: Diagram showing Ohm's Law triangle V = IR with circuit elements
excerpt: Every reading on a multimeter or clamp meter traces back to one equation: V = IR. Master Ohm's Law and you'll understand exactly what every tester is measuring — and why.

title: Continuity Testing: What It Is and Why Every Electrician Needs It
description: Learn what continuity testing is, how it works using resistance measurement, and how to use a multimeter to find open circuits, blown fuses, and broken wiring.
heroAlt: Multimeter probes testing continuity on a fuse
excerpt: Continuity testing is the quickest way to confirm a complete electrical path. Learn the physics behind it and how to run the test correctly with any multimeter.

title: Clamp Meter vs Multimeter: Which Tester Do You Actually Need?
description: Compare clamp meters and multimeters side by side — find out which instrument to use for current measurement, voltage testing, resistance checks, and field electrical work.
heroAlt: Clamp meter and multimeter placed side by side for comparison
excerpt: Both measure electrical quantities — but they work very differently. Here's a practical breakdown of when to reach for a clamp meter versus a multimeter.
